summary: Comprehensive testing completed for industrial manufacturing platform. All backend APIs (32/32) working perfectly. Frontend UI fully functional with excellent industrial dark theme, responsive design, and complete navigation. Auth protection working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Minor: Invalid route handling could be improved

passed_tests: All 32 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Login page renders with Google Sign In button
Dashboard loads with KPIs, charts, and real-time data
All navigation pages load successfully (Production, Inventory, Warehouse, Supply Chain, Traceability, Automation, Plants, Intelligence)
Search and filter functionality working in Inventory page
Work orders table and actions working in Production page
Add Plant button functional in Plants page
AI features accessible in Intelligence page
Sidebar navigation working between all pages
Auth protection redirects unauthenticated users to login
Seed data API creates demo data successfully
AI demand forecasting with GPT-5.2 working
